summary: Unknown‑source recording of a middling 1991 show that shines on Althea (and a strong Morning Dew) with Jerry’s guitar tone highlighted.
review: Both reviewers single out Althea as a highlight, praising Jerry Garcia’s hot, on‑point tone. One reviewer also calls Morning Dew great, while the overall impression of the concert is “average,” suggesting a solid but not spectacular performance. No specific comments about the recording fidelity were made, leaving its technical quality uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews give modest scores (4 and 3) with mixed praise – strong on specific songs but overall average show; no recording details to boost the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard, audience bleed, clarity, or any audio problems, so the technical quality cannot be confidently assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as average overall, but the energy peaks during Althea (and Morning Dew), giving the concert its main highlights.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Jerry's guitar tone is praised as 'on' and hot.
